class_hierarchy: PlayerComp implements UnitController, Entityc, Syncc, Timerc, Drawc
InputHandler has-a Seq<BuildPlan> linePlans, selectPlans, lastPlans
interaction_flow: DesktopInput.update(): camera pan if player dead/paused OR follow player via lerpDelta
DesktopInput.updateMovement(unit): read axis Binding.moveX/moveY → movement Vec2
InputHandler.tryPickupPayload(): Units.closest(...) → target Unit or Building
InputHandler.tryPickupPayload() → Call.requestUnitPayload(player, target) OR Call.requestBuildPayload(player, build)
DesktopInput.pollInputPlayer(): determine cursorX/cursorY from mouse world position
DesktopInput.pollInputPlayer(): auto-pause build queue if buildautopause && !unit.isBuilding()
[else if isPlacing()] → set mode=placing, selectX/Y, updateLine(selectX, selectY)
[else if plan exists (not breaking, not started)] → splan = plan (drag plan)
InputHandler.flushPlans(plans): for each plan: validPlace(x,y,block,rot) → block.onNewPlan(copy) → player.unit().addBuild(copy) → playerPlanTree.insert(copy)
[build accepts items && allowDeposit] → Call.transferInventory(player, build) [RPC → building.handleStack(item, amount, unit)]
Call.requestItem(player, build, item, amount) → Call.takeItems(build, item, amount, unit) → build.removeStack(item, amount) + unit.addItem(item, removed) + transferItemEffect
DesktopInput.useSchematic(schem): schematics.toPlans(schem, x, y) → selectPlans.addAll(plans), mode=none
axisTap(Binding.rotate) && rotatePlaced key held on cursor.build: Call.rotateBlock(player, cursor.build, dir)
key_relationships: DesktopInput extends InputHandler (inherits all build/mine/drop logic)
DesktopInput calls player.unit() to access current Unit for movement/aiming
PlayerComp.handlePreviewPlans(groupId, plans) → previewPlansAssembling accumulates, committed after 100ms
Tile.build is the live Building reference; Tile.block() returns Block type

key_state_fields.DesktopInput.selectX/Y: tile coords of drag-start for line placement or break selection
key_state_fields.DesktopInput.deleting: true while erasing break-plans by dragging
key_state_fields.DesktopInput.shouldShoot: true when mouse is not over scene and input is unlocked
key_state_fields.InputHandler.block: currently selected Block for placement (null = not placing)
key_state_fields.InputHandler.droppingItem: true when player tapped themselves to drop carried item
key_state_fields.InputHandler.isBuilding: whether the build queue is active (can be auto-paused)
key_state_fields.InputHandler.selectPlans: schematic / preview plans pending placement flush
key_state_fields.PlayerComp.previewPlansCurrent: transient committed preview build plans shown to other players

important_notes: DesktopInput.pollInputPlayer() is the core per-frame desktop input handler; pollInputNoPlayer() handles camera tap when dead
All network-sensitive actions go through static @Remote methods on Call (e.g. transferInventory, requestItem, commandUnits)
flushPlans validates each plan via validPlace(x,y,block,rot) before calling player.unit().addBuild()
Mining is entirely client-local state (mineTile field on Unit); no RPC for beginning/stopping mine
Preview plans (PlayerComp.handlePreviewPlans) are received from server with a 100ms commit window to handle out-of-order packets
Tile.build can be null (empty tile); InputHandler.tileTapped returns false immediately if build==null
DesktopInput.updateMovement also handles Payloadc-specific pickup/drop with tap+hold cooldown logic (20ms hold interval, 200ms tap delay)
